summary: Boxy audience recording, but a very nice second set makes the show enjoyable
review: The tape is an audience source that sounds a bit tinny and boxy, limiting its fidelity. Musically, reviewers highlight a "very nice" second set, indicating strong performance despite the modest audio quality.

ai_rating.rationale: One review gives 4 stars and praises the second set while noting only mild recording flaws; weighted estimate yields a solid 4‑star rating but confidence is low due to limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Audio described as "bit tin boxy" – thin, slightly muffled sound typical of older audience tapes.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set singled out as very nice; overall performance viewed positively despite limited audio detail.
